# TexFolio

> AI-Powered LaTeX Resume Builder. Create ATS-friendly resumes with AI assistance in minutes — no coding required.

## Pages

- [Home](https://texfolio.vercel.app/): Landing page with features, templates, and pricing overview
- [Templates](https://texfolio.vercel.app/templates): Browse and preview LaTeX resume templates
- [Pricing](https://texfolio.vercel.app/pricing): Subscription plans for TexFolio
- [Privacy Policy](https://texfolio.vercel.app/privacy): Data handling and privacy practices
- [Terms of Service](https://texfolio.vercel.app/terms): Terms governing use of TexFolio

- [Portfolio](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app): Gautam Kumar's personal site and projects
- [GitHub](https://github.com/theunstopabble): Gautam's open-source repositories

- Current: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
